PatternLayout.pattern: %d{HH:mm:ss.SSS} %highlight{[%level]}{FATAL=bright_red bold, ERROR=red bold, WARN=yellow bold, INFO=blue bold, DEBUG=green bold, TRACE=magenta bold} [%t] %logger{36} - %msg%n
%d{yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS} %highlight{[%level]}{FATAL=bright_red bold, ERROR=red bold, WARN=yellow bold, INFO=blue bold, DEBUG=green bold, TRACE=magenta bold} [%t] %logger{36} - %msg%n
